item.title: Get Rich
item.description:
财富自由，经济独立，精神独立，可以对自己不喜欢的事物说：不。

“I had a considerable passion to get rich. Not because I wanted Ferraris – I wanted the independence. I desperately wanted it. I thought it was undignified to have to send invoices to other people. I don‘t where I got that notion from, but I had it.”
（中文大意：我曾有强烈的致富热情。不是因为想要法拉利——我想要的是独立。我极度渴望独立。我觉得不得不向别人寄账单是一件有失尊严的事。我不知道这想法从何而来，但我就是有。）

“I wanted to get rich so I could be independent, like Lord John Maynard Keynes.”
（中文大意：我想要变得富有，这样我就能独立，就像约翰·梅纳德·凯恩斯勋爵那样。）

“It could make me independent. Then I could do what I wanted to do with my life. And the biggest thing I wanted to do was work for myself. I didn’t want other people directing me. The idea of doing what I wanted to do every day was important to me.”
（中文大意：钱能让我独立。然后我就可以做自己一生想做的事。我最想做的就是为自己工作，我不想让别人指挥我。每天做自己想做的事，这个想法对我来说很重要。）

财富自由，经济独立，精神独立，对自己不喜欢的事物说：不，需要节俭、勤奋、聪明、毅力、孤独。提高认知，是最重要的一环。生命是最宝贵的事物，时间是最稀缺的资源。如果有一天，我拥有了一个亿，大概率还会过现在的日子，因为现在的生活，是我想拥有的。拥有了财富，会让生活更精彩。

item.title: New Concept English
item.description:
Excuse me !

Man: Excuese me!

Woman: Yes?

Man: Is this your handbag?

Woman: Pardon?

Man: Is this your handbag?

Woman: Yes, it is.

Woman: Thank you very much.

Sorry, sir.

Customer: My coat and umbrella please.

Customer: Here is my ticket.

Attendant: Thank you, sir.

Attendant: Number five.

Attendant: Here’s your umbrella and your coat.

Customer: This is not my umbrella.

Attendant: sorry, sir.

Attendant: Is this your umbrella?

Customer: No, it isn’t.

Attendant: Is this it?

Customer: Yes, it is.

Customer: Thank you very much.

item.title: Example content
item.description:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nulla ullamcorper est in imperdiet molestie. Curabitur aliquet sem in ante venenatis.

Etiam vel porttitor est, vitae maximus ligula. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Quisque sapien turpis, cursus non porta ac.

Nunc nec aliquam tellus. Etiam faucibus magna nibh, ut fermentum velit consectetur id. Nullam vehicula iaculis tortor, in cursus enim auctor vitae. Duis semper pulvinar justo, at vestibulum dolor. Cras fermentum nibh quis nisl imperdiet ornare. Sed nisi nunc, dictum sit amet gravida in, finibus rhoncus orci. Donec scelerisque commodo turpis ac venenatis.

Nam vitae commodo ex. Nunc vel tellus leo.

Dugem

Nullam vehicula iaculis tortor, in cursus enim auctor vitae. Duis semper pulvinar justo, at vestibulum dolor. Cras fermentum nibh quis nisl imperdiet ornare. Sed nisi nunc, dictum sit amet gravida in, finibus rhoncus orci. Donec scelerisque commodo turpis ac venenatis.

Golem

  • Nulla vitae elit libero, a pharetra augue.

Cras fermentum nibh quis nisl imperdiet ornare. Sed nisi nunc, dictum sit amet gravida in, finibus rhoncus orci. Donec scelerisque commodo turpis ac venenatis.

  1. Vestibulum id ligula porta felis euismod semper.

  3. Maecenas sed diam eget risus.

Nam ante lacus, ornare ut lacus in, aliquet gravida orci. Donec non dignissim elit. Integer facilisis lorem sed porttitor elementum. Etiam a eleifend justo.
